task_description: Create a branding/ folder with complete brand guidelines and design assets, then completely redesign the landing page (app/page.tsx) to be visually dynamic with AI images, CSS animations, floating elements, and modern SaaS aesthetics instead of the current text-heavy generic design.

verification.summary: npx tsc --noEmit passes cleanly. All branding files created with substantial content (1138 lines total). Landing page completely rewritten (410 lines) with dark theme, animations, AI images, glassmorphism, minimal text. Review issues addressed: dead animations removed, alt text improved, dark class made explicit.
